docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARDUM,GEORGE A.&KAREN S DBA 3440 -24 ST APTS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARDUM,GEORGE A.&KAREN S DBA 3440 -24 ST APTS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,168.93 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT KARDUM,GEORGE A.&KAREN S DBA 3440 -24 ST APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARDUM,GEORGE A.&KAREN S DBA 3440 -24 ST APTS DEFENDANT PAID TAXES BUT DID NOT PAY COURT COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KARDUM,GEORGE A.&KAREN S DBA 3440 -24 ST APTS
